overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character jogging through a historic urban district resembling New Orleans at night. The character moves along wet sidewalks past brick buildings with wrought-iron balconies and neon signs, eventually turning and crossing a cobblestone intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial sidewalk with storefronts and parked cars

agents.ego_description: jogging steadily along the sidewalk past vintage parked cars and brick storefronts

entered.detail: red brick building with green wooden shutters and arched doorways
vintage blue and white station wagon parked along the curb
illuminated vertical sign with red and white lettering reading PIZZA
mature tree with thick trunk between sidewalk and street
ornate black street lamp casting warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character jogs along a wet concrete sidewalk beside a historic brick building with green shutters. A vintage blue station wagon is parked along the street, and the warm glow of street lamps reflects off the damp pavement. The pizza shop sign becomes visible on the right as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk arcade with wrought-iron balconies

events.description: passes a pedestrian in a gray suit and hat walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing to jog along the sidewalk, passing under building awnings

notable_agents.action: man in gray suit and fedora walking toward the camera, passing by on the left

entered.detail: large red illuminated sign with crown logo reading CREOLE KING HAMBURGER
decorative black wrought-iron balcony railing on upper floor of building

segments.scene_description: The character continues jogging past a pedestrian in a suit, moving under covered awnings of historic buildings with wrought-iron balconies. The red neon sign for Creole King Hamburger becomes visible in the distance ahead, marking the upcoming corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone intersection with historic columned buildings

events.description: turns left at the corner, transitioning from sidewalk to cobblestone street
crossing the cobblestone road at a marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: turning left at the corner and crossing the cobblestone street toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person holding an umbrella standing near the corner of the building

entered.detail: wet cobblestone road surface with white painted crosswalk lines
two-story building with ornate columns and wrap-around balcony with hanging lights
small blue vintage Volkswagen Beetle parked on the cross street

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the corner with the Creole King Hamburger sign, turns left, and steps onto the cobblestone street. The scene opens into a wider intersection with historic buildings featuring columned porches and balconies. The character crosses the wet cobblestones toward the opposite side where a blue Volkswagen is parked.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked urban sidewalk that eventually opens into a wide, historic cobblestone intersection. It begins with the character jogging past a brick building with green shutters and a parked blue station wagon, where street lamps cast a warm glow across the damp concrete. As the character moves forward, the view shifts past a pedestrian in a suit and under the covered awnings of buildings with wrought-iron balconies, while a red neon sign for Creole King Hamburger emerges in the distance. The scene then expands as the character reaches the corner and turns left, transitioning from the sidewalk onto wet cobblestones. Finally, the camera follows the character across the intersection toward a parked blue Volkswagen, revealing a broader vista of historic architecture with columned porches.
